jobs.title: Candidatura spontanea apprendistato
jobs.description:
Apprendistato:

Destinatari

Studenti brillanti che hanno terminato le scuole medie e si apprestano ad entrare nel mondo del lavoro. Ottengono il diploma al termine di una formazione duale che comprende una rotazione tra gli uffici orientata a fornire loro le necessarie conoscenze del settore.

Durata

4 anni (informatica)

 

Programma scolastico apprendistato informatico sviluppo applicazioni / gestione infrastrutture / sviluppo business digitale

Formazione scolastica: profilo esteso con maturità integrata, presso il Centro Professionale Tecnico a Locarno.

Corsi interaziendali: Ameti Bodio.

Requisiti

Diploma delle scuole medie con tutti i livelli attitudinali e una media superiore al 4.7.

Spiccata motivazione, passione verso il contatto con le persone, voglia di studiare e dimestichezza con le cifre e i programmi informatici.

descriptionByLocale.en: Apprenticeship: Eligible Candidates Bright students who have completed secondary school and are about to enter the workforce. They obtain a diploma at the end of a dual training program that includes a rotation between offices aimed at providing them with the necessary knowledge of the sector. Duration 4 years (informatics) Informatics Apprenticeship Program: Application Development / Infrastructure Management / Digital Business Development School Education: Extended profile with integrated maturity, at the Technical Professional Center in Locarno. Inter-company courses: Ameti Bodio. Requirements Secondary school diploma with all attitudinal levels and an average above 4.7. Strong motivation, passion for human contact, desire to study and familiarity with numbers and computer programs.
descriptionByLocale.de: Ausbildung: Bewerbergruppe Bereitschaftige Schüler, die die Sekundarschule abgeschlossen haben und in den Beruf eintreten. Sie erhalten am Ende einer dualen Ausbildung ein Diplom, das sie durch eine Rotation zwischen Büros erhalten, die ihnen die notwendigen Kenntnisse des Sektors vermitteln. Dauer 4 Jahre (Informatik) Informatik-Ausbildungsprogramm: Anwendungsentwicklung / Infrastrukturverwaltung / Digitale Geschäftsentwicklung Schulbildung: Erweitertes Profil mit integrierter Reifeprüfung, am Technischen Berufsbildungszentrum in Locarno. Interunternehmenskurse: Ameti Bodio. Anforderungen Abitur mit allen attitudinalen Niveaus und einem Durchschnitt über 4,7. Starke Motivation, Leidenschaft für den Menschenkontakt, Wunsch, zu lernen und Vertrautheit mit Zahlen und Computerprogrammen.

Ils obtiennent un diplôme à la fin d'un programme de formation dual qui comprend une rotation entre les bureaux destinée à leur fournir les connaissances nécessaires du secteur. Cours inter-entreprises : Ameti Bodio. Exigences Diplôme du collège avec tous les niveaux attitudinaux et une moyenne supérieure à 4,7. Motivation forte, passion pour le contact humain, envie d'apprendre et familiarité avec les chiffres et les programmes informatiques.

jobs.title: Customer Advisor 40%
jobs.description:
We are seeking a highly skilled individual to expertly handle, process and/or forward client calls and partner enquiries, in German, French, Italian and English, on various topics related to cards payment, in accordance with our work instructions.

This position is part of our evening and weekend team, with working hours primarily outside standard office times.

Key responsibilities: 

Answer incoming calls and handling inquiries from customers and business partners in German, French, Italian or English

Receive and process client complaints and issues related to credit, prepaid and debit cards

Ensure timely and satisfactory resolution of client concerns to enhance client satisfaction and loyalty

Ensure all customer interactions and processes comply with internal quality standards and legal regulations

Proactively find solutions for client complaints and escalating complex cases to the appropriate department

Identify sales opportunities (selling and upselling) during interactions with the customers

What do we offer?

Flexibility in working from home and the management of working hours in order to guarantee a healthy work-life balance

Numerous benefits and incentives

Well-being, motivational and team-building activities

For the job opening, we are looking for candidates who meet the following requirements:

Commercial or tourism background

Experience in customer service

Good knowledge of Office package/ PC use

Good communication skills

Languages: Italian, German/Swiss German, French and English

As the first point of contact with customers, the following soft skills are needed: courtesy, empathy, customer orientation and ability to work in team

descriptionByLocale.it: Siamo alla ricerca di un individuo altamente qualificato per gestire, elaborare e/o inviare chiamate e richieste dei partner, in tedesco, francese, italiano e inglese, su vari argomenti relativi ai pagamenti con carta di credito, in conformità alle nostre istruzioni di lavoro. Questa posizione fa parte del nostro team di sera e fine settimana, con orari di lavoro principalmente fuori dall'orario di ufficio standard. Le principali responsabilità sono: Rispondere alle chiamate in arrivo e gestire le richieste di informazioni dei clienti e dei partner aziendali in tedesco, francese, italiano o inglese Ricevere e elaborare le lamentele dei clienti e le questioni relative ai carti di credito, prepagate e debiti Assicurarsi che le preoccupazioni dei clienti vengano risolte in tempo e in modo soddisfacente per migliorare la soddisfazione e la lealtà dei clienti Assicurarsi che tutte le interazioni con i clienti e i processi siano conformi ai standard di qualità interni e alle normative legali Trovare proattivamente soluzioni per le lamentele dei clienti e far salire i casi complessi al dipartimento appropriato Identificare opportunità di vendita (vendita e aumento della vendita) durante le interazioni con i clienti Cosa offriamo? Flessibilità nel lavoro da casa e la gestione degli orari di lavoro per garantire un equilibrio tra lavoro e vita Numerose benefici e incentivi Attività di benessere, motivazione e team-building Per l'apertura del lavoro, stiamo cercando candidati che soddisfino i seguenti requisiti: Background commerciale o turistico Esperienza nel servizio clienti Buone conoscenze del pacchetto Office/uso del PC Buone abilità di comunicazione Lingue: italiano, tedesco/tedesco svizzero, francese e inglese Come primo punto di contatto con i clienti, sono necessarie le seguenti abilità soft: cortesia, empatia, orientamento al cliente e capacità di lavorare in team

Flexibilität im Home-Office und die Gestaltung der Arbeitszeiten, um ein gesundes Arbeits- und Privatleben zu gewährleisten Viele Vorteile und Anreize Wohlbefinden, Motivation und Teambuilding-Aktivitäten Für die Stellenausschreibung suchen wir Kandidaten, die die folgenden Anforderungen erfüllen: Kommerzieller oder touristischer Hintergrund Erfahrung im Kunden-Service Gute Kenntnisse des Office-Pakets/PC-Verwendung Gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Sprachen: Italienisch, Deutsch/Schweizerdeutsch, Französisch und Englisch Als erster Ansprechpartner für Kunden sind folgende weiche Fähigkeiten erforderlich: Höflichkeit, Empathie, Kundenorientierung und Fähigkeit, in einem Team zu arbeiten
descriptionByLocale.fr: Nous recherchons un individu hautement qualifié pour gérer, traiter et/ou transmettre les appels et les demandes des partenaires, en allemand, français, italien et anglais, sur divers sujets liés aux paiements par carte de crédit, conformément à nos instructions de travail. Cette position fait partie de notre équipe de soirée et de week-end, avec des horaires de travail principalement en dehors des heures de bureau standard. Responsabilités principales: Répondre aux appels entrants et gérer les demandes d'informations des clients et des partenaires commerciaux en allemand, français, italien ou anglais Recevoir et traiter les plaintes et les problèmes des clients liés aux cartes de crédit, aux cartes prépayées et aux cartes de débit Assurer que toutes les interactions avec les clients et les processus répondent aux normes de qualité internes et aux réglementations légales Trouver des solutions proactives pour les plaintes des clients et faire monter les cas complexes vers le département approprié Identifier les opportunités de vente (vente et augmentation de la vente) pendant les interactions avec les clients Qu'est-ce que nous offrons? Flexibilité dans le travail à domicile et la gestion des heures de travail pour garantir un équilibre entre travail et vie De nombreux avantages et incitations Activités de bien-être, de motivation et de team-building Pour l'ouverture de l'emploi, nous recherchons des candidats qui répondent aux exigences suivantes: Arrière-plan commercial ou touristique Expérience dans le service client Connaissances solides du paquet Office/usage du PC Compétences de communication solides Langues : italien, allemand/suisse allemand, français et anglais Comme premier point de contact avec les clients, les compétences douces suivantes sont nécessaires : courtoisie, empathie, orientation client et capacité à travailler en équipe

jobs.title: Employee Card Onboarding

titleByLocale.fr: Onboarding de la Carte de Paiement

jobs.description:
The candidate will be responsible for implementing the payment card issuing process for corporate customers, analysing and evaluating requests, setting spending limits and activating complementary services.

The role involves direct contact with potential customers, including by telephone, in order to gather information, clarify requirements and support the customer throughout the entire process.

Key responsibilities: 

Answer incoming calls and handling inquiries from customers and business partners in German, French, Italian and English

Manage payment card issuance requests for corporate customers

Analyse and evaluate the validity of the request, verifying the customer's profile and consistency with company policies

Request and verify the necessary documentation (e.g. corporate, financial and identification documents)

Define the most appropriate spending limit based on customer analysis and risk level

Enter and configure complementary services associated with the card (e.g. insurance, reporting, digital services, spending controls)

Contact potential customers by telephone to discuss their requests in detail, provide clarification and commercial support

Collaborate with internal teams (credit risk, operations) to ensure a smooth and effective process

Ensure compliance with current regulations and internal procedures (KYC, AML, credit policy)

What do we offer?

Flexibility in working from home and the management of working hours in order to guarantee a healthy work-life balance

Numerous benefits and incentives

Well-being, motivational and team-building activities

For the job opening, we are looking for candidates who meet the following requirements:

Administrative background

Privious experience in similar position

Good knowledge of Office package/ PC use

Languages: Italian / German native proficiency / Basic French / Basic English

Customer orientation and ability to work in team

Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

descriptionByLocale.it: Il candidato sarà responsabile dell'implementazione del processo di emissione della carta di pagamento per i clienti aziendali, analisi e valutazione delle richieste, impostazione dei limiti di spesa e attivazione dei servizi complementari. Il ruolo prevede un contatto diretto con i potenziali clienti, compreso tramite telefono, al fine di raccogliere informazioni, chiarire le richieste e supportare il cliente durante tutto il processo. Le principali responsabilità sono: Rispondere alle chiamate in arrivo e gestire le richieste di informazione dei clienti e dei partner aziendali in tedesco, francese, italiano e inglese Gestire le richieste di emissione della carta di pagamento per i clienti aziendali Analizzare e valutare la validità della richiesta, verificando il profilo del cliente e la coerenza con le politiche aziendali Richiedere e verificare la documentazione necessaria (ad esempio documenti aziendali, finanziari e di identificazione) Definire il limite di spesa più adatto sulla base dell'analisi del cliente e del livello di rischio Inserire e configurare i servizi complementari associati alla carta (ad esempio assicurazioni, reporting, servizi digitali, controlli di spesa) Contattare i potenziali clienti tramite telefono per discutere le loro richieste in dettaglio, fornire chiarimenti e supporto commerciale Collaborare con le squadre interne (rischio di credito, operazioni) per garantire un processo liscio e efficace Assicurarsi che la conformità con le normative vigenti e le procedure interne (KYC, AML, politica di credito) Cosa offriamo? Flessibilità nel lavoro da remoto e gestione degli orari di lavoro per garantire un equilibrio lavoro-vita sano Numerosi benefici e incentivi Attività di benessere, motivazione e team building Per l'apertura di lavoro, stiamo cercando candidati che soddisfino i seguenti requisiti: Background amministrativo Esperienza precedente in posizione simile Buona conoscenza del pacchetto Office/uso del PC Lingue: italiano / tedesco nativo / francese base / inglese base Orientamento al cliente e capacità di lavorare in team Residente nel Ticino o disposto a trasferirsi

descriptionByLocale.de: Der Kandidat wird für die Implementierung des Zahlungskarten-Ausgabeprozesses für Unternehmenskunden verantwortlich sein, Anfragen analysieren und bewerten, Ausgabegrenzen setzen und Zusatzdienste aktivieren. Die Rolle beinhaltet direkten Kontakt mit potenziellen Kunden, einschließlich Telefonkontakt, um Informationen zu sammeln, Anforderungen zu klären und den Kunden während des gesamten Prozesses zu unterstützen. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten: Antworten auf eingehende Anrufe und bearbeiten von Anfragen von Kunden und Geschäftspartnern auf Deutsch, Französisch, Italienisch und Englisch Verwalten Sie die Anfragen zur Ausgabe von Zahlungskarten für Unternehmenskunden Analysieren und bewerten Sie die Gültigkeit der Anfrage, überprüfen Sie das Kundenprofil und die Übereinstimmung mit den Unternehmenspolitiken Anfordern und überprüfen Sie die erforderliche Dokumentation (z.B. Unternehmensdokumente, Finanzdokumente und Identifikationsdokumente) Definieren Sie den geeigneten Ausgabegrenzen auf der Grundlage der Kundenanalyse und des Risikostands Einfügen und Konfigurieren Sie die Zusatzdienste, die mit der Karte verbunden sind (z.B. Versicherungen, Berichterstattung, digitale Dienste, Ausgabekontrollen) Kontaktieren Sie potenzielle Kunden per Telefon, um ihre Anfragen im Detail zu diskutieren, Klarstellungen und kommerziellen Unterstützung zu bieten Arbeiten Sie mit den internen Teams (Kreditrisiko, Operations) zusammen, um einen reibungslosen und effektiven Prozess zu gewährleisten Stellen Sie sicher, dass die Einhaltung der aktuellen Vorschriften und internen Verfahren (KYC, AML, Kreditpolitik) gewährleistet ist Was bieten wir? Flexibilität in der Arbeit von zu Hause und die Verwaltung der Arbeitszeiten, um ein gesundes Arbeit-Leben-Gleichgewicht zu gewährleisten Viele Vorteile und Anreize Wohlbefinden, Motivation und Teambuilding-Aktivitäten Für die Stellenanzeige suchen wir Kandidaten, die die folgenden Anforderungen erfüllen: Verwaltungshintergrund Vorherige Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Position Gute Kenntnisse des Office-Pakets/PC-Verwendung Sprachen: Deutsch / Italienisch Muttersprache / Französisch Grundkenntnisse / Englisch Grundkenntnisse Kundenorientierung und Fähigkeit, in einem Team zu arbeiten Wohnort im Kanton Tessin oder bereit, sich umzuziehen
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le candidat sera responsable de l'implémentation du processus d'émission de la carte de paiement pour les clients d'entreprise, d'analyse et d'évaluation des demandes, de définition des limites de dépense et d'activation des services complémentaires. Le rôle implique un contact direct avec les clients potentiels, y compris par téléphone, pour recueillir des informations, clarifier les demandes et soutenir le client tout au long du processus. Les principales responsabilités sont: Répondre aux appels entrants et gérer les demandes d'informations des clients et des partenaires commerciaux en allemand, en français, en italien et en anglais Gérer les demandes d'émission de la carte de paiement pour les clients d'entreprise Analyser et évaluer la validité de la demande, vérifier le profil du client et la cohérence avec les politiques de l'entreprise Demander et vérifier la documentation nécessaire (par exemple, documents d'entreprise, documents financiers et documents d'identité) Définir les limites de dépense les plus appropriées en fonction de l'analyse du client et du niveau de risque Insérer et configurer les services complémentaires associés à la carte (par exemple, assurances, rapports, services numériques, contrôles de dépense) Contacter les clients potentiels par téléphone pour discuter de leurs demandes en détail, fournir des explications et un soutien commercial Collaborer avec les équipes internes (risque de crédit, opérations) pour garantir un processus fluide et efficace Assurer la conformité avec les réglementations actuelles et les procédures internes (KYC, AML, politique de crédit) Qu'est-ce que nous offrons? Flexibilité dans le travail à distance et la gestion des heures de travail pour garantir un équilibre travail-vie sain De nombreux avantages et incitations Activités de bien-être, de motivation et de team building Pour l'ouverture de poste, nous recherchons des candidats qui répondent aux exigences suivantes: Arrière-plan administratif Expérience précédente dans une position similaire Connaissances solides du paquet Office/usage du PC Langues : français / allemand natif / italien / anglais de base Orientement client et capacité de travailler en équipe Résident dans le canton du Tessin ou prêt à se déplacer

Flexibility in working from home and the management of working hours in order to guarantee a healthy work-life balance Numerous benefits and incentives Well-being, motivational and team-building activities For the job opening, we are looking for candidates who meet the following requirements: Commercial or tourism background Experience in customer service Good knowledge of Office package/ PC use Good communication skills Languages: Italian, German/Swiss German, French and English As the first point of contact with customers, the following soft skills are needed: courtesy, empathy, customer orientation and ability to work in team Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

jobs.title: IT Card Management Analyst / Specialist
jobs.description:
The candidate will join the IT Card Management Centre of Excellence, with cross-functional responsibilities for credit and debit card management systems.

The systems operate on cloud-native architectures in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and support key payment processes in a highly regulated banking environment.

The role involves actively contributing to functional and technical analysis activities, supporting the evolution of application solutions and integration with core banking, payment circuits and external platforms.

 

Key Responsibilities

Functional and Process Analysis

•    Analyse and understand Card Management processes: card issuance, lifecycle management, authorisations, clearing & settlement, fraud and chargebacks.

•    Collect, analyse and formalise business requirements, translating them into functional and technical specifications.

•    Support the business in defining IT solutions consistent with the bank's operational, regulatory and compliance models.

•    Collaborate with internal stakeholders (Operations, Compliance, Risk, Security).

Technical and IT Analysis

•    Draft functional and technical documentation (application specifications, integration flows, data mapping).

•    Support the design and evolution of microservice architectures in a cloud environment.

•    Collaborate with internal and external development teams during the development, testing and release phases.

•    Support the analysis and management of application incidents and production issues.

DevOps and Technologies

•    Operate in a DevOps environment, actively collaborating with development teams.

•    Support and understand continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines, using automation tools (e.g. Jenkins).

•    Use code versioning systems (Git, Bitbucket) for application configuration management.

•    Provide support in application and infrastructure troubleshooting in cloud-native and distributed environments.

•    Contribute to the stability, quality and scalability of solutions, collaborating on monitoring, logging and performance issues.

•    Have a basic knowledge of Java and event-driven microservice architectures.

Must Have

•    Experience in functional and technical analysis in IT.

•    Knowledge of credit and debit card payment systems.

•    Ability to understand and analyse complex and distributed application architectures.

•    Experience, even non-specialist, in cloud environments, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

•   Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate.

Basic knowledge of:

•   DevOps models and CI/CD pipelines

•   Git / GitHub

•   Microservice architectures

•   Kafka or messaging / event streaming systems

•   Change Data Capture

•    PostgreSQL (PGSQL)

•    Java

•   Monitoring and logging tools (e.g. Splunk, Dynatrace)

Nice to Have

•    Experience in banking or financial contexts.

•    Knowledge of major payment circuits (e.g. Visa, Mastercard).

•    Familiarity with GCP services supporting cloud-native architectures (containers, logging, monitoring).

•    Knowledge of application security and compliance issues (e.g. PCI DSS, data protection).

•    Basic knowledge of Kubernetes and oauth2 application authorisation standards

________________________________________

Soft Skills

•    Strong analytical approach and solution orientation.

•    Ability to operate in complex and regulated environments.

•    Aptitude for working in multidisciplinary teams.

•    Ability to communicate effectively with technical and business stakeholders.

•    Proactivity and focus on continuous improvement.

jobs.title: Collaboratore Servizi Logistici - Ufficio Tecnico
jobs.description:
Siamo alla ricerca di un/una Collaboratore/Collaboratrice Servizi Logistici – Ufficio Tecnico per rafforzare il nostro team. In questo ruolo sarai responsabile del coordinamento e della pianificazione delle attività di manutenzione e riparazione degli edifici e degli impianti tecnici, garantendo operazioni efficienti e un servizio di alta qualità per i nostri clienti interni.

Organizzazione e pianificazione dei lavori di manutenzione e riparazione degli edifici e degli impianti tecnici

Gestione delle richieste di intervento e comunicazione con i clienti interni

Gestione dei processi di acquisto materiale e ordini di lavoro

Attività di manutenzione, riparazione e altre attività in ambito logistica incluso servizio di picchetto

Gestione e coordinamento del team di manutenzione

Conoscenza della tecnica degli edifici (impianti elettrici, riscaldamento, impianti frigoriferi, impianti sanitari, ventilazione, reti ICT)

Esperienza (10 anni) nella gestione, manutenzione e riparazione di edifici e impianti tecnici, incluso il servizio di picchetto

Conoscenza di applicativi per la gestione di ticket e asset (EAM, SAP o simili)

Buone conoscenze di sistemi di gestione edifici (Siemens, Honeywell o simili)

Ottima conoscenza degli applicativi Office e best practice nell’utilizzo delle tecnologie (PC, App, ecc.)

Esperienza nella conduzione di un team e nella gestione di piccoli progetti

Orientamento verso il cliente (interno) e forte spirito per il lavoro di squadra

Residente in Ticino

Diploma AFC in ambito tecnico (edilizia e/o impianti) con preferenza per l’ambito elettrico, elettrotecnico o elettromeccanico. Eventuali formazioni superiori in ambito tecnico costituiscono titolo preferenziale

Italiano (lingua madre) e buona conoscenza di una seconda lingua nazionale (preferibilmente tedesco). Buone conoscenze dell’inglese

jobs.title: Credit & Client Advisor (m/f)
jobs.description:
To strengthen our team, we are looking for a dynamic, motivated and customer-oriented professional.

Key Responsibilities:

Managing customer interactions via phone and email

Actively listening to client needs and supporting the identification of suitable solutions

Analyzing financial documentation, including salary slips and financial statements

Conducting preliminary assessments of credit risk and clients’ financial capacity

Collaborating with the team on case processing and monitoring

Maintaining and updating data in internal systems

Excellent knowledge of at least three of the following languages: Italian, German, French, and English

Commercial training or equivalent qualification

Strong communication skills and active listening abilities

Interest in and ability to analyze financial data (salary slips, financial statements, economic documentation)

Analytical mindset and accuracy in risk assessment

Team spirit, reliability, and sense of responsibility

Good IT skills, including proficiency with spreadsheets

Ideal Profile:

Young, curious individual with a strong willingness to learn

Professional and customer-oriented approach

Ability to work in a structured and organized manner

jobs.title: Compliance Officer Senior
jobs.description:
We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Compliance professional to join our team. The ideal candidate will have solid experience in regulatory matters, particularly in AML, cross-border activities and sanctions, and will be able to provide clear guidance and practical solutions to the business. This role requires strong analytical skills, sound judgment, and the ability to manage complex cases in a dynamic and evolving regulatory environment. The candidate will play a key role in ensuring adherence to applicable regulations, supporting business initiatives, and contributing to the ongoing development of the Compliance framework.

Key Responsibilities:

Analysis, review and handling of cases related to AML, cross-border activities and sanctions, including the preparation of assessments and formal positions for the business

Opportunity to analyze cases related to market abuse and product suitability, as well as FATCA and CRS matter

Definition of Compliance requirements and supervision of their implementation within projects aimed at developing new products or services

Drafting and review of internal policies and procedures in the Compliance area (e.g. AML, cross-border and sanctions)

Collection of data and information for Compliance reporting addressed to senior management, as well as for periodic Compliance risk assessments

Preparation and delivery of Compliance training

Monitoring of regulatory developments in the Compliance area and analysis of their impact

Handling requests from External and Internal Audit

Execution of consolidated supervision activities in the Compliance area

Ability to interact effectively with colleagues from different departments (e.g. Business, Operations, IT)

Apply a critical and proactive approach in identifying new solutions

Work independently

Manage a high volume of cases efficiently

At least 5 years of experience in the banking sector in a similar role (Compliance Officer), preferably not limited to AML but also covering broader regulatory Compliance and advisory activities (cross-border, sanctions, reporting, Compliance risk assessment, consolidated supervision), as well as experience in overseeing Compliance-related projects

Experience in Compliance related to market conduct (e.g. monitoring of market abuse, product suitability reviews, etc.) is considered a strong asset

Experience in Compliance related to FATCA and CRS is considered a plus

Languages: Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus.

Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

jobs.title: Risk Manager - Asset Liability Management (ALM) and Liquidity Risk

titleByLocale.it: Risk Manager - Asset Liability Management (ALM) and Liquidity Risk
titleByLocale.en: Risk Manager - Asset Liability Management (ALM) and Liquidity Risk
titleByLocale.de: Risk Manager - Asset Liability Management (ALM) and Liquidity Risk
titleByLocale.fr: Risk Manager - Asset Liability Management (ALM) and Liquidity Risk

jobs.description:
The selected candidate will be responsible for managing risks related to Asset Liability Management (ALM) and liquidity risk, ensuring that the company maintains a solid financial position and can navigate market challenges effectively.

Key Responsibilities:

Conduct in-depth analysis of risks related to ALM and liquidity risk, identifying potential vulnerabilities and developing mitigation strategies

Monitor the company's daily liquidity position, ensuring compliance with regulatory and internal requirements in alignment with Basel framework and FINMA ordinance

Collaborate with treasury and finance departments to optimize liquidity management practices, including cash flow forecasting, liquidity buffer management and funding strategies/ contingency plan

Assess and manage the company's exposure to interest rate risk in the banking book (IRRBB), developing strategies to mitigate adverse impacts on earnings and capital

Conduct liquidity stress testing and scenario analysis to evaluate the impact of adverse market conditions on the company’s liquidity position

Prepare detailed and accurate reports on liquidity risk and ALM for senior management, Committee, Regulators, providing clear analysis and recommendations

Ability to work under pressure in a dynamic environment setting priorities and meet tiny deadlines

Technical Skills: Advanced knowledge of ALM and liquidity risk, interest rate risk management tools and methodologies, including scenario analysis and stress testing

Analytical Skills: Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret and synthesize large volumes of complex data using programming knowledge (Phyton, R, SQL)

Communication Skills: Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present technical information clearly and concisely to non-technical stakeholders

Experience: At least 5 years of experience in risk management, with a particular focus on ALM/ liquidity risk or treasury department

Languages: Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus

Professional certification in risk management (e.g., FRM, PRM) is a plus

Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

Collaborate with treasury and finance departments to optimize liquidity management practices, including cash flow forecasting, liquidity buffer management and funding strategies/ contingency plan

Assess and manage the company's exposure to interest rate risk in the banking book (IRRBB), developing strategies to mitigate adverse impacts on earnings and capital

Conduct liquidity stress testing and scenario analysis to evaluate the impact of adverse market conditions on the company’s liquidity position

Prepare detailed and accurate reports on liquidity risk and ALM for senior management, Committee, Regulators, providing clear analysis and recommendations

Ability to work under pressure in a dynamic environment setting priorities and meet tiny deadlines

Technical Skills: Advanced knowledge of ALM and liquidity risk, interest rate risk management tools and methodologies, including scenario analysis and stress testing

Analytical Skills: Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret and synthesize large volumes of complex data using programming knowledge (Phyton, R, SQL)

Communication Skills: Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present technical information clearly and concisely to non-technical stakeholders

Experience: At least 5 years of experience in risk management, with a particular focus on ALM/ liquidity risk or treasury department

Languages: Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus

Professional certification in risk management (e.g., FRM, PRM) is a plus

Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate
